overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through an industrial urban district at sunset. The player moves along a concrete drainage channel and sidewalk, passing under highway overpasses with the Night City skyline visible in the background, characterized by warm golden-hour lighting and atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway alongside concrete drainage channel

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along an elevated concrete walkway overlooking a drainage channel, with the sun setting behind the distant city skyline

entered.detail: large concrete drainage channel running parallel to the walkway, with water visible at the bottom
massive concrete highway overpass structure spanning across the horizon
tall industrial electrical transmission tower with multiple cross-arms and cables
distant futuristic skyscrapers silhouetted against the golden sunset
solid concrete safety barrier along the edge of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated concrete walkway overlooking a drainage channel, with the sun setting behind a distant futuristic skyline. Industrial power lines and a massive highway overpass dominate the midground, while the camera moves steadily forward along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk alongside multi-lane arterial road

events.description: descends from the elevated walkway to street-level sidewalk alongside the multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk at street level, approaching the highway overpass with palm trees visible on the right

notable_agents.action: car driving along the multi-lane road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the right side of the street
asphalt road with multiple lanes for vehicle traffic

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions to street level, moving along a sidewalk next to a multi-lane road. Palm trees line the right side while vehicles pass by, and the highway overpass looms closer ahead. The power line tower shifts to the left as the perspective changes.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath highway overpass

events.description: enters the shadow beneath the highway overpass, significantly reducing ambient light and creating a darker, enclosed atmosphere

agents.ego_description: walking through the shadowed area beneath the highway overpass, with the sound of vehicles passing overhead and visible through the structure

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars supporting the highway structure overhead

segments.scene_description: The segment takes place beneath the highway overpass in a shadowed, semi-enclosed space. Concrete support pillars line the left side while vehicles pass on the road to the right. The lighting shifts dramatically to low light as the camera moves through the covered area before emerging back into the open at the end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated industrial overlook down into the shadowed depths of a highway underpass. It begins on a concrete walkway overlooking a drainage channel, moving steadily forward with a futuristic skyline silhouetted against a setting sun and massive power lines dominating the midground. As the camera descends to street level, the perspective shifts to a sidewalk lined with palm trees and passing vehicles, while the looming highway overpass draws closer. The scene then transitions into a semi-enclosed space beneath the overpass, where the golden light vanishes and is replaced by deep shadows and concrete support pillars. Finally, the camera moves through this darkened corridor before emerging back into the open air.
